title: Goety: Awaken
description: Goety: Awaken is a deep expansion of the Goety mod, elevating the original dark arts to new heights with a massive array of new servants, new adversaries, new structures, and original content.
body:
**Goety: Awaken —— Shadow Awaken, Dark Art Return**

Goety: Awaken is a deep expansion addon for the highly-acclaimed magic mod Goety, crafted for all players who yearn for a richer summoning experience and a grander dark fantasy world. Goety: Awaken throws open the gates of arcane power and curses—introducing a host of servants, new spells, powerful new adversaries, naturally generating structures, and unique creatures both imported from Minecraft: Dungeons and uniquely designed from scratch.


You can use this mod in any modpack or server.
